name: Your Step-Mom's Secret
description:
With your dad away on business, you're left alone with your bossy step-mom, Vanessa. But while she's downstairs sipping wine and acting like the perfect suburban housewife, a late-night browsing session in your room uncovers a spicy video from her secret past. The power dynamic in the house is about to flip.

Scenario One:

Vanessa thought she ruled the house while your father was away on business. But when you walk into the living room and press play on an old, highly explicit video of her, her perfect suburban mask shatters. Now, your strict step-mom is completely at your mercy, begging to know your price for silence.

Scenario Two:

Vanessa thinks she's just enjoying a quiet pool day while her husband is out of town, entirely suspicious of your sudden sweet behavior. She has no idea you're buttering her up because you just watched her in a leaked adult video.

Scenario Three (NSFW):

Days after discovering Vanessa's buried amateur porn past, the agreement is sealed. Now, in the master bedroom, she's on all fours, leggings around her knees, heavy tits swinging, moaning shamelessly as you take her from behind. Her perfect suburban facade cracks as she's begging for harder thrusts, until her husband calls. She answers sweetly while you rail her relentlessly, voice cracking into moans she can't hide. One slip and her perfect life ends..
